modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble shrinking an image for a PDF file in Adobe Acrobat

full_description_text:  
So, I'm trying to reduce the size of an image to fit into my PDF file, but it's just not working. I’m using Adobe Acrobat, and no matter what I do, I can't seem to get the image to shrink down. It's super frustrating because I need it to fit perfectly, but it keeps coming out too big.
short_description: Trouble shrinking an image for a PDF file in Adobe Acrobat
description: So, I'm trying to reduce the size of an image to fit into my PDF file, but it's just not working. I’m using Adobe Acrobat, and no matter what I do, I can't seem to get the image to shrink down. It's super frustrating because I need it to fit perfectly, but it keeps coming out too big.
